output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?amount WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P183 wd:Q401278 ; wdt:P183 wd:Q72353 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P2047 ?duration .
  FILTER(?date > "1972-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  ?duration wikibase:quantityValue ?amount .
  ?duration wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q11573 .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?amount)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2

The core issue is likely that game durations (in minutes) are not consistently recorded as quantities in Wikidata for historical baseball matchups.

LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2
